source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Diana drew a rectangular grid of 12 squares on squared paper. Some of the squares were then painted black. In each white square she wrote the number of black squares that shared an edge with it (a whole edge, not just a vertex). The figure shows the result. Then she did the same with a rectangular grid of 2 by 1009 squares. What is the maximum value that she could obtain as the result of the sum of all the numbers in this grid? <image1>
extraction_notes: question contains "<image1>" placeholder and explicitly refers to "The figure shows the result"

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图像资产齐全，核心语义支撑完整
可验证性高，数值答案明确且登记校验通过
无显著风险标记，适合直接进入候选池
